title: trig — degrees default + radians
manager: Trigonometry with degrees as the default and radians available explicitly — because most people reaching for sin/cos in a state machine are thinking in degrees, and silently defaulting to radians is a reliable source of "why is my angle 57 times too big" bugs. Both are present; the default simply matches how humans actually specify angles instead of how the math library happens to.
cs: sin/cos/tan/asin/acos/atan/atan2 and friends; degrees default, radians variants explicit; pinned semantics.
